violations.text: The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the dishwashers. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black residue and other debris. Ice machine must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 07/29/2025
The door to one of the restrooms is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
